inputs.situation: I got promoted to staff engineer but my team thinks I am the same person I was last quarter.
inputs.limiting_belief: I do not deserve this role and they will find out.
inputs.fear: Being publicly exposed as a fraud in a design review.

inputs.situation: I have enough money to live comfortably for the next decade but I feel poor every time I open my banking app.
inputs.limiting_belief: There will never be enough; I have to keep grinding.
inputs.fear: Ending up homeless like my uncle did at 60.

inputs.situation: I told my parents I am taking a sabbatical to learn music.
inputs.limiting_belief: I am letting my family down and wasting the opportunities they gave me.
inputs.fear: Being seen as ungrateful and irresponsible.

inputs.situation: I gained 12 kg during my parents' illness and I avoid mirrors and photos.
inputs.limiting_belief: My body is unworthy until I lose this weight.
inputs.fear: Being judged or pitied by old friends.

inputs.situation: I have not written in nine months. The cursor blinks and I make tea instead.
inputs.limiting_belief: I have run out of things to say; the well is dry.
inputs.fear: That I was never really a writer to begin with.

inputs.situation: मैं तीस साल बाद नौकरी छोड़कर अपना व्यवसाय शुरू करना चाहता हूँ
inputs.limiting_belief: इस उम्र में नई चीज़ शुरू करना बेवकूफी है
inputs.fear: पैसे और सम्मान दोनों खो दूँगा

inputs.situation: My girlfriend wants to take a break, मुझे लगता है यह breakup का beginning है
inputs.limiting_belief: I am not enough; मैं कभी किसी के लिए पर्याप्त नहीं हूँ
